mapper.select: INSERT INTO tb_retailer_notification (id, retailer_id, type_id, order_id, content, is_read, created_date) VALUES (DEFAULT, #{param1}, #{param2}, #{param3}, #{param4}, #{param7}, NOW()) RETURNING id

INSERT INTO tb_distributor_notification (id, distributor_id, type_id, order_id, content, is_read, created_date) VALUES (DEFAULT, #{param1}, #{param2}, #{param3}, #{param4}, #{param7}, NOW()) RETURNING id
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tb_retailer_notification WHERE retailer_id = #{currentUserId})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tb_distributor_notification WHERE distributor_id = #{currentUserId})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tb_retailer_notification WHERE retailer_id = #{currentUserId} AND id = #{id})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tb_distributor_notification WHERE distributor_id = #{currentUserId} AND id = #{id})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tb_retailer_notification WHERE retailer_id = #{currentUserId} AND is_read = false)
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tb_distributor_notification WHERE distributor_id = #{currentUserId} AND is_read = false)

SELECT id, (SELECT name FROM tb_notification_type WHERE id = type_id) AS notificationType, order_id AS orderId, NULL AS store, NULL AS image, content AS title, NULL AS description, is_read AS seen, created_date AS createdDate FROM tb_retailer_notification WHERE retailer_id = #{currentUserId} ORDER BY created_date DESC

SELECT id, (SELECT name FROM tb_notification_type WHERE id = type_id) AS notificationType, order_id AS orderId, NULL AS store, NULL AS image, content AS title, NULL AS description, is_read AS seen, created_date AS createdDate FROM tb_distributor_notification WHERE distributor_id = #{currentUserId} ORDER BY created_date DESC
UPDATE tb_retailer_notification SET is_read = true WHERE retailer_id = #{currentUserId} AND id = #{id} RETURNING 1
UPDATE tb_distributor_notification SET is_read = true WHERE distributor_id = #{currentUserId} AND id = #{id} RETURNING 1
UPDATE tb_retailer_notification SET is_read = true WHERE retailer_id = #{currentUserId} RETURNING 1
UPDATE tb_distributor_notification SET is_read = true WHERE distributor_id = #{currentUserId} RETURNING 1
